surfaces.header: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-800 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.terminal: bg-[#050505] border border-emerald-500/30 rounded-none font-mono text-emerald-400 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.05)] relative overflow-hidden

components.button: rounded-none transition-all font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-sm
components.primary_button: bg-emerald-500 text-zinc-950 border border-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-400 hover:border-emerald-300
components.outline_button: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white
components.input: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-none focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500/50 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 font-mono text-sm
components.badge_critical: bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/30 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-mono
components.badge_high: bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-500 border border-orange-500/30 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-mono
components.badge_medium: bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500 border border-yellow-500/30 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-mono
components.badge_low: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-500 border border-blue-500/30 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-mono
components.badge_info: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-500 border border-emerald-500/30 rounded-none uppercase text-xs tracking-wider font-mono

images.description: Abstract dark terminal hacker background, subtle glowing green data nodes, deep obsidian black background
images.usage: Use in the login/setup wizard hero section behind a glass or solid container.

images.description: Minimalist geometric logo for a cybersecurity AI named MCP'Arsonist
images.usage: Use in the header/navigation and setup wizard splash screen.

motion.scanlines: bg-[linear-gradient(rgba(18,16,16,0)_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.06),rgba(0,255,0,0.02),rgba(0,0,255,0.06))] bg-[length:100%_4px,3px_100%] pointer-events-none absolute inset-0 z-10 opacity-20

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and Terminal/Swiss Brutalist archetype. No rounded corners (use `rounded-none`).
Use JetBrains Mono for all headings, labels, metrics, button text, and terminal outputs.
Use IBM Plex Sans for body paragraphs and long-form descriptions.
Grid Layout: The Dashboard must use the 'Control Room' grid with dense spacing (`gap-4`). Span main charts across multiple columns, keep summary metrics 1-col wide.

Terminal Component: Must implement a custom UI that resembles a retro terminal. Deep black bg (`#050505`), neon green/amber accents, monospace font. Add subtle CSS scanlines over the terminal using the motion.scanlines class.
Use Shadcn UI extensively, but heavily override the default radii and soft shadows. Use `rounded-none`, 1px solid borders, and intense hover states.
Never use pure black or pure white except for specific high-contrast text. Base background is `#09090b` (zinc-950).
All vulnerabilities must be color-coded (Red/Orange/Yellow/Blue/Green) and displayed with high-contrast mono badges.
Every key interactive element must include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="start-scan-btn"`).
Do NOT use native HTML inputs for complex interactions. Use Shadcn Dropdowns, Dialogs, Selects, etc., but customize them to the brutalist theme.
The header must be sticky, backdrop-blur-xl `bg-zinc-950/80` with a sharp bottom border.
All cards must have a 1px solid border (`border-zinc-800`), no dropshadows, and straight edges.
